core_mechanism: conformal (Weyl) rescaling of a metric quadratic form by a positive scalar factor combined with a coordinate change to map it into proportionality with a flat reference form, plus an exhaustive classification of all such transformation-and-factor pairs
brief_reason: The abstract derives all coordinate transformations and associated conformal factors that carry the Robertson-Walker metric into forms conformal to the flat Lorentz-Minkowski metric, i.e. a complete enumeration of scalar-rescaling maps to a flat reference form.
